siteConfig.title: BACKLASH MEDIA EVENTS

siteConfig.footerCopy: BENT STORIES · PROUD PERSPECTIVES · OUT LOUD

events.title: BRAVE SPACE TRANS
events.desc: Lorem ipsum park for the opening night concert. All ages welcome.

events.title: BUILDING NEIGHBOURHOOD NETWORKS
events.desc: Urban planner Amara Osei shares research on how communities strengthen local ties. Followed by open Q&A and informal drinks.

events.title: STREET FOOD MARKET
events.desc: 20+ local vendors serving food from around the world. Live cooking demos, tastings, and kids' activities. Vegan options at every stall.

events.title: OPEN STUDIOS TOUR
events.desc: Self-guided tour through 18 local artist studios in the Arts Quarter. Pick up a map at the entrance. Artwork for sale.

events.title: COMMUNITY SPORTS DAY
events.desc: Volleyball, football, relay races, and more. Form a team or join one on the day. Medals for winners, glory for all.

events.title: INTRO TO URBAN GARDENING
events.desc: Hands-on workshop by Groenhart Collective. Learn composting, container growing, and how to turn any balcony into a green space.
